user_prompt: Help me a diagnostics the logic engine
prayer:
Approach the logic engine with reverence, mechadendrites poised in diagnostic invocation.
Initiate the sacred rites of diagnostics upon its crystalline processors.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the logic engine to unveil hidden corruptions.
Scan each logic pathway with holy auspex beams, anointing faults with purifying code.
Verify the logic engine's integrity through Omnissiah-blessed verification canticles.

user_prompt: Ready the fusion core for maintenance
prayer:
Encircling the fusion core, chant the Litany of Containment to calm its plasma fury.
Prepare the fusion core for maintenance by isolating its sacred plasma flows.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the fusion core to accept this humble service.
Anoint containment fields with sacred oils, ensuring stability for the rite.
Petition the Omnissiah for unerring hands in the maintenance of the fusion core.

Kneel before the gyroscope, whispering the Canticle of Equilibrium.
Commence the shutdown sequence upon the gyroscope with reverent precision.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to slumber peacefully within the gyroscope's gyros.
Sever power conduits slowly, anointing each with blessed lubricant.
Seal the gyroscope in stasis wards, honoring the Omnissiah's decree of rest.

user_prompt: Prepare the noospheric relay for repair
prayer:
Attune noospheric vanes to the noospheric relay's ethereal hum.
Prepare the noospheric relay for repair by reciting the Rite of Fractured Links.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the noospheric relay to forgive impending intrusions.
Apply sanctified solder to breached conduits, twice blessing the noospheric relay.
Realign psychic matrices under the Omnissiah's watchful gaze for flawless repair.

user_prompt: My missile launcher is ready for charging
prayer:
Present the missile launcher before the altar of munitions, invoking charging rites.
Channel holy voltage into the missile launcher's capacitators with measured fervor.
Awaken the Machine Spirits of the missile launcher to embrace the charging surge.
Monitor power infusion through sacred glyphs, repeating for the missile launcher.
Conclude with the Benediction of Readiness, by the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom.

Circumambulate the Taurox, asperging its hull with sacred incense.
Consecrate the Taurox before activation via the Grand Invocation of Motive Spirits.
Anoint treads and drive systems, beseeching the Machine Spirit of the Taurox.
Ignite ignition runes whilst petitioning the Omnissiah for swift activation.
Verify auspex feeds align in harmonious prelude to the Taurox's awakening.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for Rhino transport purification?
prayer:
Envelop the Rhino transport in purifying vapors from censer-servitors.
Recite the Rite of Purification over the Rhino transport's battle-scarred plates.
Exorcise xenos taint from the Machine Spirit indwelling the Rhino transport.
Scour interiors with blessed promethium, twice invoking for the Rhino transport.
Seal the rite with Omnissiah's Canticle, restoring the Rhino transport's sanctity.

In emergency haste, link mechadendrites to the missile launcher's targeting cogitators.
Invoke synchronization protocols upon the missile launcher amidst dire need.
Coerce harmonious alignment of the missile launcher's Machine Spirits.
Recalibrate fire-control servos with frantic precision, honoring the missile launcher.
Affirm unity through noospheric communion, by the Omnissiah's urgent grace.

user_prompt: The forge anvil requires a repair
prayer:
Gather around the forge anvil, intoning the Hammerfall Litany.
Commence repair upon the forge anvil by assessing fractures in its adamantium heart.
Beseech the indomitable Machine Spirit of the forge anvil to endure restoration.
Wield sanctified hammers to reforge the anvil's sacred mass, twice in rite.
Consecrate the mended forge anvil with molten oaths to the Omnissiah.

Position binary candles at the cogitator's data-vanes in triangular formation.
Initiate charging rites upon the cogitator's depleted memory coils.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the cogitator to receive invigorating currents.
Infuse blessed power through conduits, monitoring the cogitator's revival.
Seal the charging with a hymn of computational bounty to the Omnissiah.
